metaDescription: Subscribe to my newsletter. Photonics, quantum sensing, optics, and whatever I'm reading or building.
subtitle: Occasional notes on photonics, machine learning, optics, and whatever I'm reading or building.
whatToExpect: Papers I'm reading, code I'm writing, things I'm building in the lab, and sometimes personal essays. Short and infrequent. No spam. Unsubscribe as you like.
